name: IdsEdwBnfVndrRemitRateDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'WITH cte_main AS (
  SELECT 
    BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_SK,
    COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, ''UNK'') AS SRC_SYS_CD,
    BNF_VNDR_ID,
    BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD,
    EFF_DT_SK,
    ',pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate,' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    ',pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate,' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    TERM_DT_SK,
    BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE,
    USER_ID,
    LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,
    ',pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle,' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    ',pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle,' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK
  FROM ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,'.BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE
  LEFT JOIN ',pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner,'.CD_MPPNG CD
    ON SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK
  WHERE BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_SK <> 0 AND BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_SK <> 1
),
cte_unk AS (
  SELECT
    0 AS BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_SK,
    ''UNK'' AS SRC_SYS_CD,
    ''UNK'' AS BNF_VNDR_ID,
    ''UNK'' AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS EFF_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS TERM_DT_SK,
    0 AS BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE,
    ''UNK'' AS USER_ID,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,
    100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    0 AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK
),
cte_na AS (
  SELECT
    1 AS BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_SK,
    ''NA'' AS SRC_SYS_CD,
    ''NA'' AS BNF_VNDR_ID,
    ''NA'' AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS EFF_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS TERM_DT_SK,
    0 AS BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE,
    ''NA'' AS USER_ID,
    ''1753-01-01'' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,
    100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,
    1 AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK
)
SELECT * FROM cte_main
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM cte_unk
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM cte_na' )

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


DESCRIPTION:    Pulls data from IDS Facets table BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE  into EDW table BNF_VNDR_REMIT_RATE_D
